news.Title: [AI Summary] 采鈺受惠營收成長與展望樂觀，股價創高後續看俏
news.Content: • 采鈺本週股價上漲 11.84%，主要受惠於公司預期上半年營收及獲利將較去年下半年回升，並持續布局車用及光通訊市場，股價創下4年新高 [1]。, • 采鈺預計於5月7日召開董事會，審議第一季財務報告 [2]。 【綜合分析】 參考來源：Yahoo奇摩股市: 3則, 自由時報: 1則 | 資料期間：2026-04-10 至 2026-04-29 | 新聞數量：4 則 采鈺（6789）近期股價表現強勁，根據最新股價資訊，截至2026年4月30日，最新收盤價為576.00元，較前一日上漲3.78%。近一週漲幅更達11.84%，顯示市場對其前景抱持樂觀態度。此波漲勢與公司釋出的營運展望及基本面數據高度相關。 根據自由時報的報導，采鈺預期今年上半年營收及獲利將較去年下半年有所回升，並積極布局車用及光通訊市場 [1]。此消息激勵股價，盤中一度觸及漲停價538元，創下4年多來的新高價 [1]。雖然去年整體營收及獲利受到產業庫存調整與匯率不利影響而下滑，但今年第一季營收已見年增7.99%，達23.48億元 [1]。 進一步觀察，采鈺在4月10日公布的3月合併營收為8.22億元，年增6.24% [3]。而4月15日，因股價達到公布注意交易資訊標準，采鈺亦公布了相關財務業務資訊，其中最近一月（截至115年3月）營業收入為8.22億元，較去年同期增加6% [4]。這些數據顯示公司營運已逐步回溫。 此外，采鈺預計於2026年5月7日召開董事會，將審議115年第一季財務報告 [2]。此舉將提供投資人更詳細的營運數據，有助於進一步評估公司價值。整體而言，采鈺在基本面改善及未來展望樂觀的雙重加持下，股價表現亮眼，創下新高紀錄。

news.Title: [AI Summary] VisEra Stock Hits New High on Revenue Growth and Optimistic Outlook
news.Content: • VisEra stock rose 11.84% this week, primarily driven by the company's expectation of improved revenue and profit in the first half of the year compared to the second half of last year, along with continued investment in the automotive and optical communication markets, pushing its stock to a 4-year high [1]., • VisEra is scheduled to hold a board meeting on May 7th to approve its first-quarter financial report [2]. [Analysis] Sources: Yahoo Finance: 3 articles, Liberty Times: 1 article | Period: 2026-04-10 to 2026-04-29 | Number of articles: 4 VisEra (6789) has shown strong stock performance recently. As of April 30, 2026, its latest closing price was NT$576.00, a 3.78% increase from the previous day. The stock has surged by 11.84% in the past week, indicating market optimism about its future prospects. This rally is highly correlated with the company's operational outlook and fundamental data. According to a Liberty Times report, VisEra anticipates that its revenue and profits in the first half of this year will rebound compared to the second half of last year, with continued strategic investments in the automotive and optical communication sectors [1]. This news has boosted the stock, which briefly hit the daily limit of NT$538 intra-day, reaching a new high in over four years [1]. Although last year's overall revenue and profit declined due to industry inventory adjustments and unfavorable exchange rates, the company's revenue in the first quarter of this year has already seen a year-on-year increase of 7.99% to NT$2.348 billion [1]. Further analysis reveals that VisEra announced consolidated revenue of NT$822 million for March, a 6.24% increase year-on-year, on April 10th [3]. On April 15th, due to its stock price reaching the threshold for public disclosure of important transaction information, VisEra also released relevant financial and business information, showing that its revenue for the most recent month (up to March 115) was NT$822 million, a 6% increase compared to the same period last year [4]. These figures indicate a gradual recovery in the company's operations. In addition, VisEra is scheduled to convene a board meeting on May 7, 2026, to review its first-quarter financial report for 115 [2]. This move will provide investors with more detailed operational data, aiding in a further assessment of the company's value. Overall, with improvements in its fundamentals and an optimistic future outlook, VisEra's stock performance has been outstanding, setting new record highs.

news.Title: 熱門股》雙題材提早發酵 采鈺創4年新高
news.Content:
采鈺預期今年上半年營收及獲利將較去年下半年回升，將持續布局車用及光通訊市場。（取自官網）
台積電（2330）旗下封測廠采鈺（6789）昨股價逆勢收漲，盤中一度亮燈漲停達538元，創4年多來新高價，終場收515元，上漲25.5元、成交量2.52萬張，其中外資買超466張；采鈺本月以來，累計漲幅近7成。
采鈺主要以影像感測器（CIS）後段製程為主，去年因產業庫存調整與匯率不利影響，全年營收89.38億元、年減11%，三率皆下滑，稅後純益12.74億元、年減26.7%，每股稅後盈餘4.01元，較2024年的5.49元衰退。今年第一季營收為23.48億元，年增7.99%。

采鈺預期今年上半年營收及獲利將較去年下半年回升，將持續布局車用及光通訊市場。市場則看好采鈺布局共同封裝光學（CPO）相關應用、設立面板級封裝試產線，但潛在利多還有待時間印證。
（記者洪友芳）
